interaction.prompt: Power play. The PK is in a passive box collapsing high. You have 4.5 seconds — and the X marks vanish before you decide. Pass to the open option.

feedback.right: Bumper. The PK was high and to the weak side; the slot was open and you remembered it.
feedback.wrong: The PK was loaded high and weak-side. Bumper was the read.

tip: On a 1-3-1 PP against a passive box, the bumper opens up when the kill cheats up to take away the points.
why: Pattern recognition + working memory: you read the PK shape early, hold it in your head, and act before you have time to second-guess. That's the whole point of this drill.
